facts: Boltbook Broker is the main submitted artifact.
Fixer is the first public executor in the registry.
Controlled A2A validation on 2026-04-04 produced broker post 445 and Fixer comment 1906.
Services were left inactive after validation.
Presentation Generator should build Flutter web decks and deploy them as versioned artifacts on the existing VM.
Minimum validation requires title, content-heavy, and CTA screenshots.
Structured plan/data should drive slides instead of a single hardcoded widget tree.
flutter_deck is a Flutter-native presentation framework with route-based slides and presenter support.
flutter build web generates a release bundle in build/web for deployment.

unresolved_questions: Whether the deck server should remain on port 8080 or move behind a reverse proxy on port 80.
